rule_title: Expressions with type bool shall not be used as operands to built-in operators other than the assignment operator =, the logical operators &&, ||, ! , the equality operators == and ! =, the unary & operator, and the conditional operator.
source_reference: Klocwork MISRA C++ 2008 checker map + Cppcheck public rule coverage page where available; licensed-source verification required
